name: Swing Shift Golf Club
address: 10300 N Scottsdale Rd, Paradise Valley, AZ 85253
about: Swing Shift Golf Club is an indoor golf simulator venue in Scottsdale offering 24/7 access to over 1,200 world-renowned golf courses. The facility features state-of-the-art technology with advanced analytics and lifelike course simulations. It provides multiple membership tiers, punch cards, and a swanky lounge atmosphere suitable for both serious practice and social gatherings. Best for golfers seeking flexible, high-quality indoor play with amenities for events and leagues.
why_golfers_like_it: Flexible membership options and punch cards
Swanky lounge atmosphere for social play

food_and_drink.notes: Available; high-end decor and lounge vibe suggest a food menu
Available; swanky lounge atmosphere implies full bar service

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: While not explicitly stated, bringing your own clubs is recommended for the best experience, though rentals may be available.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue has a full bar and kitchen, but outside food/drink policies are not specified.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round on a simulator takes approximately 1-2 hours depending on the course and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Swing Shift is kid-friendly, accommodating families and offering a fun atmosphere suitable for all ages.
